name: t1059_004_shell_proc
query_text: SELECT pid, parent, name, path, cmdline, uid FROM processes WHERE name IN ('bash','sh','dash','zsh','ksh','csh','tcsh','fish') ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

name: t1059_004_shell_history
query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, mtime FROM file WHERE path LIKE '%/.bash_history' OR path LIKE '%/.zsh_history' OR path LIKE '%/.sh_history';
